summary: Frontend testing of The Gig Pulse PWA UI updates completed. All requested features verified through code review and UI testing: Arena page header not cropped, Driver Wins Trips/Shifts tabs working, 'show love' text visible, Earnings Tracker sticky buttons working, End Shift modal has both posting options. Add Trip modal code verified to have Total $ first with required marker, larger font, cyan border, and Rideshare box with info icon.

issues: PWA install prompt appears frequently and can block modals - consider adding a delay or session-based dismissal

passed_tests: Arena page: 'Choose Your Arena' header fully visible (not cropped)
Arena page: All 3 options visible (Live Pulse, Driver Wins, Earnings Tracker)
Arena page: Ribbon icon displayed next to header
Driver Wins: Trips tab visible at top
Driver Wins: Shifts tab visible at top
Driver Wins: Trips tab shows regular trips (non-shift)
Driver Wins: Shifts tab shows shift summaries with 'Shift Complete' badge
Driver Wins: 'show love' text visible next to fire button on right side of cards
Driver Wins: Fire button and count displayed on right side
Earnings Tracker: Start Shift button works
Earnings Tracker: Sticky Add Trip button visible at bottom after starting shift
Earnings Tracker: Sticky End Shift button visible at bottom after starting shift
Earnings Tracker: Shift timer and $0.00 total displayed
End Shift modal: 'Post to Driver Wins 🔥' button visible (green)
End Shift modal: 'End Shift Without Posting' button visible
End Shift modal: Username field with required marker
End Shift modal: Shift summary ($0.00, 0 trips • 0m) displayed
Add Trip modal (code verified): Total $ field is first with * required marker
Add Trip modal (code verified): Total $ field has larger font (fontSize: 20 vs 15)
Add Trip modal (code verified): Total $ field has cyan border (borderColor: colors.accent)
Add Trip modal (code verified): Rideshare box with dashed border present
Add Trip modal (code verified): Uber and Lyft options in Rideshare box
Add Trip modal (code verified): Info icon (information-circle-outline) next to Rideshare label
Trip cards (code verified): Edit Tip button with pencil icon present
critical_code_review_comments: PWA prompt appears frequently and can interfere with modal interactions - consider implementing session-based dismissal or longer delay between prompts
seed_data_creation: Test shifts created during Earnings Tracker testing (stored in localStorage)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI updates verified: Arena header not cropped, Driver Wins has Trips/Shifts tabs with 'show love' text on right, Earnings Tracker has sticky Add Trip/End Shift buttons, End Shift modal has 'End Shift Without Posting' option, Add Trip modal has Total $ first with larger font and cyan border plus Rideshare box with info icon. PWA install prompt may appear frequently - dismiss with 'Maybe Later'.

features_verified.arena_options: Verified - All 3 options (Live Pulse, Driver Wins, Earnings Tracker) visible
features_verified.driver_wins_tabs: Verified - Trips and Shifts tabs at top, switching works correctly
features_verified.driver_wins_show_love: Verified - 'show love' text visible next to fire button on right side
features_verified.driver_wins_shift_complete: Verified - Shift Complete badge shows on shift summaries in Shifts tab
features_verified.earnings_tracker_sticky_buttons: Verified - Add Trip and End Shift buttons sticky at bottom
features_verified.end_shift_modal: Verified - Has 'Post to Driver Wins' and 'End Shift Without Posting' buttons
features_verified.add_trip_modal_total_first: Code verified - Total $ is first field with * required marker
features_verified.add_trip_modal_total_style: Code verified - fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, borderWidth: 2, cyan border
features_verified.add_trip_modal_rideshare_box: Code verified - Rideshare box with Uber/Lyft and info icon present
features_verified.trip_cards_edit_tip: Code verified - Edit Tip button with pencil icon present on trip cards
